summary: Regression pass after deployment fixes (app.json bundleIdentifier/package + welcome.tsx Google redirect URL). Verified both fixes are in place. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases PASS (auth signup/login/me/forgot-reset/change-password/google-session, users search/get/update, friends full-flow + block/unblock, chats open/list/send-text/image/reply/edit/search/delete, stories create/feed/view/viewers/delete, notifications list/read, WebSocket typing + REST message broadcast + invalid-token rejection). Frontend smoke: welcome screen renders XYTEEE/NEXUS wordmark, 'Continue with Google', 'Create your Nexus account', 'Sign in' CTAs; tapping Continue with Google now navigates to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fnexus-social-hub.preview.emergentagent.com%2F confirming window.location.origin is being used (no Platform.OS fallback). Email signup flow completes and lands on /feed with the Reveries stories carousel + empty 'Nothing echoing yet' conversations state. Tab bar (feed/find/bonds/you) present. No page JS errors. Pre-existing (already reported in iteration_1) React Native Web deprecation warnings still present: shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents. No new regressions introduced by the deployment fixes.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — still present (carry-over from iteration_1). Migrate shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to boxShadow for RN Web parity.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — carry-over. Move pointerEvents from prop to style.

action_items: (carry-over from iteration_1) Fix signup/login error rendering so 422 validation errors are stringified rather than shown as '[object Object]'.
(carry-over) Migrate shadow* → boxShadow and pointerEvents prop → style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: welcome.tsx redirect logic is correct for web (uses window.location.origin + '/'), and gracefully falls back to Linking.createURL('auth') for native. Matches the deployment WARN recommendation.
app.json ios.bundleIdentifier and android.package both = 'com.xyteee.nexus' — deployment blockers resolved.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for the deployment-fix regression scope; ~90% overall (pre-existing signup 422 rendering bug from iteration_1 still open)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_alpha/bravo/reset*/chg*/blk1*/blk2* users per run (idempotent random suffix). Frontend smoke created one smoke_<rand>@nexus.io user via signup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deployment fixes verified. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://nexus-social-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_nexus_api.py (~14s). Google redirect now uses window.location.origin (confirmed via live navigation to auth.emergentagent.com?redirect=... with the frontend origin). Open items from iteration_1 (signup 422 stringification, Welcome contrast, shadow*/pointerEvents deprecations) are still not fixed but out of scope for this iteration.
